[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000100 1
1 001100011 4
2 110101101 6
3 101011110 6
4 010001100 3
5 000010111 4
6 010000011 3
7 010110000 3

47 74 110111010 6

37 73 001100011 4 match 1
